Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Namespace Pandowdy.EmuCore

Classes

AppleSoftHookTable

Holds AppleSoft ROM hook actions for high-level BASIC debugging. Each hook has an intrinsic verbosity level; invocation supplies a targetLevel.

CPUAdapter

Adapter wrapping a third-party 6502 CPU emulator for Pandowdy compatibility (stopgap implementation).

CardFactory
LanguageCard

Manages the Apple IIe Language Card memory banking for the $D000-$FFFF address space.

MemoryAccessEventArgs

Event arguments for memory access notifications to non-UI consumers.

MemoryPool
NullCard

Represents an empty expansion slot in the Apple IIe, providing no functionality.

RenderContext

Context for rendering a single video frame, containing frame buffer, memory access, and system status.

Slots

Implements the Apple IIe expansion slot system, managing peripheral cards and their I/O and ROM access.

SoftSwitch

Represents a single Apple IIe soft switch with a name and boolean state.

SoftSwitches

Manages all Apple IIe soft switches and notifies responders when switches change.

SystemRamSelector
Utility
VA2M

Main Apple IIe emulator orchestrator coordinating CPU, bus, memory, and timing.

VA2MBus

VA2M-specific system bus that coordinates CPU, memory, and I/O operations for Apple IIe emulation.

Enums

MemoryPool.Ranges
SoftSwitches.SoftSwitchId

Identifies specific Apple IIe soft switches for type-safe access.

Made with docfx
